astdump.name: load_url_plain
load_url_parameter
dashql_viz_position
astdump.input: VIZ weather_avg USING LINE ( position = ( row = 0, column = 0, width = 4, height = 15 ) )

astdump.name: dashql_viz_position_short
dashql_input_calendar_date
astdump.input: INPUT foo TYPE DATE USING CALENDAR; VIZ (SELECT foo) USING TABLE;

astdump.name: dashql_input_calendar_date_range
astdump.input: INPUT foo TYPE DATE[2] USING CALENDAR; VIZ (SELECT foo[0], foo[1]) USING TABLE;
